---
name: Replication
about: Attempt to replicate a finding from the literature
title: "[Replication] [Brief finding description]"
labels: replication, research
---

## Context
Citation of the paper and finding to replicate.

## What to replicate
Describe the specific result, table, or figure.

## Data requirements
What data is needed? Is it available?

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Code produces numerical output
- [ ] Output is within reasonable range of original finding
- [ ] Deviations from original methodology are documented

## Verification
How close does the replication need to be? What tolerance is acceptable?

## Limitation note
Note any data or methodological constraints that prevent exact replication.
